_note: Static reference table for canvas2d week-1 harness. 'Bridge' here refers to the C++-side widget_bridge.cpp register_function('canvas...') surface. Entries claim what the bridge SHOULD route to. Gotchas section documents known production-hardened deviations from spec; harness flags DIVERGE when a catalog entry is marked 'supported' but the gotcha says it can't be fully implemented.

arc.notes: Bridge canvasArc is immediate-mode stroke; shim must synthesize as cubic-bezier path. SKILL gotcha #1.

arcTo.notes: Conservative lineTo-only fallback; radius IGNORED. SKILL gotcha #1.

clip.notes: Falls back to canvasClipRect bounds when path-mode unsupported.

strokeText.notes: Bridge has no stroke-path text; falls back to fillText with strokeStyle color. SKILL gotcha #5.

measureText.notes: Falls back to char-width estimate when bridge fn unregistered.

transform.notes: Bridge only exposes replace, not concat. Pure-translation falls through; rotate/scale/skew is no-op.

createLinearGradient.notes: Constructs JS-side CanvasGradient; flushed via canvasSetLinearGradient on fillStyle assign.

createRadialGradient.notes: Bridge takes single (cx,cy,r); shim uses outer circle. SKILL gotcha #3.

createConicGradient.notes: pulp #1434 bridge-thin gap-fill. Skia routes via SkGradientShader::MakeSweep (real sweep). CG degrades to first-stop colour.

createPattern.notes: Deferred from pulp #1434 — needs real image-resource plumbing. Returns null per-spec-permitted. SKILL gotcha #5.

addColorStop.notes: JS-side accumulator on CanvasGradient; flushed positionally via canvasSetLinearGradient. SKILL gotcha #2.

drawImage.notes: Supports the 5- and 9-arg forms; 3-arg supported via shim default sizing.

getImageData.notes: Returns base64 RGBA blob; shim decodes.

fillStyle.notes: Solid color OR CanvasGradient. Gradient stops flushed via positional args. SKILL gotcha #2.

strokeStyle.notes: Bridge has no stroke-gradient setter; gradient strokeStyle degrades to first-stop color.

miterLimit.notes: pulp #1434 bridge-thin gap-fill. Sticky stroke state. Skia: SkPaint::setStrokeMiter. CG: CGContextSetMiterLimit. Spec: ≤0/NaN/Infinity ignored at the shim.

lineDashOffset.notes: Mutating doesn't re-flush — only re-passed on next setLineDash.

font.notes: Shim parses '<size>px <family>'; full CSS font shorthand NOT supported.

imageSmoothingEnabled.notes: pulp #1434 bridge-thin gap-fill. Sticky paint flag. Skia: SkSamplingOptions(kLinear vs kNearest). CG: CGContextSetInterpolationQuality(Low vs None).

imageSmoothingQuality.notes: pulp #1434 bridge-thin gap-fill. Skia: low=kLinear, medium=+mipmap, high=Mitchell cubic. CG: kCGInterpolationLow/Medium/High.

shadowBlur.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. Sticky state on the C++ canvas — Skia DropShadow image filter, CG CGContextSetShadowWithColor.

shadowColor.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. CSS color string parsed via the shared parseColor helper.

shadowOffsetX.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. Sticky offset in CSS pixels; combines with shadowOffsetY.

shadowOffsetY.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. Sticky offset in CSS pixels; combines with shadowOffsetX.

filter.notes: Not implemented in shim or bridge.

direction.notes: Tracked locally; not pushed to bridge.

gotchas.arc-as-path: ctx.arc/arcTo/ellipse/roundRect: bridge canvasArc strokes immediately; shim synthesizes path via cubic-bezier or polyline approximation. SKILL gotcha #1.
gotchas.radial-single-circle: createRadialGradient: bridge takes single (cx,cy,r); shim uses outer circle (x1,y1,r1). True two-circle gradient unsupported. SKILL gotcha #3.
gotchas.cg-conic-degraded: createConicGradient: Skia renders the real sweep via SkGradientShader::MakeSweep, but CG has no native conic shader and degrades to first-stop colour. pulp #1434.
gotchas.no-pattern-bridge: createPattern: not implemented; shim returns null. SKILL gotcha #5.
gotchas.stroke-no-gradient: strokeStyle gradient: bridge has no stroke-gradient setter; degrades to first-stop color.
gotchas.transform-no-concat: ctx.transform(a,b,c,d,e,f): bridge only exposes replace (setTransform); pure-translation falls through, rotate/scale/skew is no-op.
gotchas.no-strokeText-path: strokeText: bridge has no stroke-text path; falls back to fillText with strokeStyle color.
